description: Declarative taxonomy of observation methods shipped with the observer. Each entry maps to a hand-written module under crates/idiolect-observer/src/methods/<module>.rs that implements the ObservationMethod trait. The generated module in the same crate re-exports the struct types and provides a METHODS slice + default_methods() constructor for registering the bundled set.

methods.name: correction-rate
methods.description: Per-lens correction counts grouped by reason. Signals translation-quality rumor.

methods.name: encounter-throughput
methods.description: Encounter traffic by kind and downstream result. Signals firehose liveness.

methods.name: verification-coverage
methods.description: Per-lens verification counts by kind, result, and distinct verifiers. Signals formal-channel evidence.

methods.name: lens-adoption
methods.description: Per-lens encounter count and distinct-invoker DIDs. Signals adoption breadth.
